action: Replace self-asserted evidence acceptance booleans with a derived, fail-closed binding gate.

progress.finding: Trust booleans are assertions. Acceptance must be derived by comparing actual artifact bytes, attestation subject, envelope declaration, expected source identity, trusted-builder policy, and an external signature-verifier report.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical logic

handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel evidence workflows should replace precomputed acceptance booleans with the R-005 gate and supply authenticated output from their cryptographic signature verifier. A passing gate remains provenance acceptance, not proof of claim truth.
